name: Vaxcyte, Inc.
business: Vaxcyte is a clinical-stage vaccine innovation company developing broad-spectrum pneumococcal conjugate vaccines (PCVs) using its XpressCF cell-free protein synthesis platform. Its lead candidates include VAX-31 (31-valent), VAX-24 (24-valent), and VAX-XL, targeting pneumococcal disease in adults and children. The company also has preclinical candidates VAX-A1 for Group A Streptococcus and VAX-GI for shigellosis.
sellsTo: U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) and ACIP for recommendations
namedSuppliers: Patheon Manufacturing Services LLC (Thermo Fisher Scientific)

exposures.sentence: We are re-engineering the way highly complex vaccines are made through the XpressCF cell-free protein synthesis platform...Our pipeline includes: PCV candidates that we believe are among the broadest-spectrum PCV candidates currently in development, targeting the approximately $8 billion global pneumococcal vaccine market.

catalysts.sentence: We expect to announce topline safety, tolerability and immunogenicity data from this study in the fourth quarter of 2026.
We expect to report safety, tolerability and immunogenicity data from the OPUS-2 and OPUS-3 studies in the first half of 2027.

We expect to announce topline safety, tolerability and immunogenicity data from the primary three-dose immunization series and booster dose either sequentially or together by the end of the first half of 2027.
We plan to initiate a Phase 1 adult study for VAX-A1 in 2026, with the primary objective of assessing safety and tolerability.
Subject to the results of the Phase 3 studies, which are expected to read out in 2026 and 2027, we plan to submit a BLA shortly following the completion of the last Phase 3 study.

tamClaims.claim: Global pneumococcal vaccine market approximately $8 billion
tamClaims.sentence: targeting the approximately $8 billion global pneumococcal vaccine market.

tamClaims.claim: Global vaccine market projected to reach $115.77 billion by 2033 from $72.75 billion in 2025
tamClaims.sentence: The global vaccine market size is projected to reach $115.77 billion by 2033 from an estimated $72.75 billion in 2025, growing at a compounded annual growth rate of 5.78% from 2026 to 2033.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. adult pneumococcal market estimated annual sales more than $1.5 billion in 2025
tamClaims.sentence: The U.S. adult pneumococcal market generated estimated annual sales of more than $1.5 billion in 2025.
